theme_notes: Drawn from: Trump rejecting Iran's latest peace proposal on war day 64 (Strait of Hormuz blockade, $25B cost), Spirit Airlines ceasing operations after a failed $500M bailout, the White House Correspondents' Dinner gunman formally charged with attempted assassination, the Knicks setting an NBA playoff record with a 47-point halftime lead, and Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz's confirmed engagement.
settled: You're square. Spirit Airlines is not. One of you has a future.
Balanced, unlike the Strait of Hormuz. Enjoy it — this never lasts.
Nothing owed. Harry Styles is engaged. The world is briefly okay.
youOwe: Less than a tank of gas. The bar is low. You found a way under it.
The Knicks led by more at halftime. You'll survive this too.
Barely a number. Smaller than Trump's remaining Iran options.
Enough for a Spirit Airlines carry-on fee. They're gone. You're not. Yet.
One tank of gas in war-economy pricing. You owe that. Exciting.
Harry Styles proposed to Zoë Kravitz for free. You can't even Venmo $100.
The Knicks were up 47 at the half. You're down $300. Momentum matters.
Spirit Airlines died owing more. Not helpful, but contextual.
This is what $4.30-a-gallon America looks like in someone's debt.
Charged — like the Correspondents' Dinner suspect. Unlike your Venmo.
Trump rejected Iran's peace proposal. Your partner is taking notes.
The Iran war has billed $25B so far. You're $800 in. Closing the gap.
You are now a non-state debt actor. The IMF has noticed.
Gas prices peaked at a 4-year high. So has your partner's patience.
Spirit's board had a bailout plan. You should have one of those.
The Iran war entered day 64 with no exit. Your debt has the same vibe.
The Correspondents' Dinner shooter got charged. This debt should be tried separately.
Spirit Airlines needed $500M and dissolved. You've failed a smaller ask and persisted.
theyOwe: Pocket change. But at $4.30 a gallon, pocket change has a new weight.
They owe you less than Harry Styles' ring cost. Only one is worth celebrating.
The Knicks scored 47 before halftime. They owe you $30. Both are records of some kind.
The Rockets clawed back from 3-0 down. You can chase $80 too.
Harry Styles is engaged. Your partner owes you $150. Both are commitments of unclear wisdom.
Spirit Airlines couldn't raise $500M. Your partner can't raise $100. Pattern recognition.
At $4.30 a gallon, that's 84 gallons of justified resentment.
Trump rejected Iran's peace deal. Reject your partner's repayment 'plan' the same way.
The Knicks' halftime margin was 47. Your advantage is $350. Press it.
The Correspondents' Dinner shooting trended for a week. This balance should too.
The Strait of Hormuz is blockaded. So is every payment attempt from this person.
Spirit Airlines had no money and no excuses. Your partner has one of those.
Iran won't give up the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner won't give up your $3k.
Gas at $4.30 is painful. Being owed $3k is a different register of pain.
The Pentagon priced the Iran war at $25B. This is your relationship's equivalent.
Your partner owes you more than Spirit Airlines raised in its final week. Both end badly.
Iran's nuclear program is cheaper to dismantle than your partner's excuses.
Gas hit $4.30 because of a war. Your partner's debt has similarly catastrophic origins.
